```{r}

##################
## Package loading
##################

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)

```

```{r}

#######################################################################################################################################
## Recreate Manhattan plots using GAPIT results output
# - An additional track on the plot is included to show average donor proportion in each 1 Mb bin that the markers used for GWAS are in
#######################################################################################################################################

bins_path <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Pop80_population_mean_bins.csv"

# Directory where GWAS results files live
# - Change to BLUP directories as needed
model_dirs <- c(
  BLINK = "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Blink_results_BLUE_filterWithinPop",
  MLM   = "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/MLM_results_BLUE_filterWithinPop",
  MLMM  = "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/MLMM_results_BLUE_filterWithinPop"
)

# Directory where plot file outputs will go
# - Change to BLUP directory as needed
out_dir <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Plots_replotted_BLUEs"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

agg_out_file <- file.path(out_dir, "GWAS_significant_hits_across_models_traits.csv")

# Chromosomes
CHRS <- c("chr1A","chr1B","chr1D",
          "chr2A","chr2B","chr2D",
          "chr3A","chr3B","chr3D",
          "chr4A","chr4B","chr4D",
          "chr5A","chr5B","chr5D",
          "chr6A","chr6B","chr6D",
          "chr7A","chr7B","chr7D")

# Colors by subgenome
subg_of <- function(x) factor(sub(".*([ABD])$", "\\1", x), levels = c("A","B","D"))
pal3 <- c(A = "#1b9e77", B = "#d95f02", D = "#7570b3")

# Plot dimension specifications
donor_ymax <- 0.80
png_width <- 2600
png_height <- 1400
png_res <- 200

# FDR significance threshold to use
fdr_alpha <- 0.05

# Read bins file obtained during introgression mapping pipeline
bins_raw <- read.csv(bins_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    Chrom    = factor(as.character(Chrom), levels = CHRS),
    Subg     = subg_of(Chrom),
    StartMb  = Start / 1e6,
    EndMb    = End   / 1e6,
    CenterMb = (StartMb + EndMb) / 2
  )

chr_lengths <- bins_raw %>%
  group_by(Chrom) %>%
  summarise(chr_lenMb = max(EndMb, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(Chrom)

chr_lengths$offsetMb <- c(0, cumsum(as.numeric(head(chr_lengths$chr_lenMb, -1))))
axis_df <- transform(chr_lengths, centerMb = offsetMb + chr_lenMb / 2)
xmax_totalMb <- max(chr_lengths$offsetMb + chr_lengths$chr_lenMb)

bins_geom <- bins_raw %>%
  left_join(chr_lengths[, c("Chrom", "offsetMb")], by = "Chrom") %>%
  mutate(Pos_cumMb = CenterMb + offsetMb)

# Helper functions
extract_trait_from_file <- function(filepath, model_name) {
  fname <- basename(filepath)
  sub(
    paste0("^GAPIT\\.Association\\.GWAS_Results\\.", model_name, "\\.(.+)\\.csv$"),
    "\\1",
    fname
  )
}

standardize_gwas <- function(gwas, model_name, trait_name, filepath) {
  if ("Chr" %in% names(gwas)) {
    names(gwas)[names(gwas) == "Chr"] <- "Chrom"
  }
  if (!"Chrom" %in% names(gwas) && "SNP" %in% names(gwas)) {
    gwas$Chrom <- sub("_.+$", "", gwas$SNP)
  }

  if (!"Pos" %in% names(gwas) && "Position" %in% names(gwas)) {
    names(gwas)[names(gwas) == "Position"] <- "Pos"
  }

  if (!"MAF" %in% names(gwas) && "maf" %in% names(gwas)) {
    names(gwas)[names(gwas) == "maf"] <- "MAF"
  }

  if (!"Effect" %in% names(gwas) && "effect" %in% names(gwas)) {
    names(gwas)[names(gwas) == "effect"] <- "Effect"
  }

  if (!"P.value" %in% names(gwas)) {
    stop("Missing P.value in: ", filepath)
  }
  if (!"Pos" %in% names(gwas)) {
    stop("Missing Pos in: ", filepath)
  }
  if (!"Chrom" %in% names(gwas)) {
    stop("Missing Chrom/Chr in: ", filepath)
  }

  gwas <- gwas %>%
    mutate(
      Model = model_name,
      Trait = trait_name,
      Chrom = as.character(Chrom),
      Pos = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Pos)),
      P.value = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(P.value)),
      MAF = if ("MAF" %in% names(.)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(MAF)) else NA_real_,
      Effect = if ("Effect" %in% names(.)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Effect)) else NA_real_,
      H.B.P.Value = if ("H&B.P.Value" %in% names(.)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(`H&B.P.Value`)) else NA_real_
    )

  gwas <- gwas %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(Chrom),
      !is.na(Pos),
      !is.na(P.value),
      P.value > 0,
      P.value <= 1,
      Chrom %in% CHRS
    )

  if (nrow(gwas) == 0) return(gwas)

  gwas <- gwas %>%
    arrange(P.value) %>%
    mutate(
      BH_FDR = p.adjust(P.value, method = "BH"),
      FDR_sig = BH_FDR <= fdr_alpha
    )

  gwas
}

plot_two_track <- function(gwas_std, title_lab, outfile_png) {
  if (nrow(gwas_std) == 0) {
    message("Skip empty GWAS table: ", title_lab)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  gwas2 <- gwas_std %>%
    mutate(
      Chrom = factor(Chrom, levels = CHRS),
      Subg = subg_of(Chrom),
      PosMb = Pos / 1e6,
      neglog10P = -log10(P.value)
    ) %>%
    left_join(chr_lengths[, c("Chrom", "offsetMb")], by = "Chrom") %>%
    mutate(Pos_cumMb = PosMb + offsetMb)

  # FDR line based on largest raw p-value among BH-significant SNPs
  if (any(gwas2$FDR_sig, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    fdr_p <- max(gwas2$P.value[gwas2$FDR_sig], na.rm = TRUE)
    fdr_y <- -log10(fdr_p)
  } else {
    fdr_p <- NA_real_
    fdr_y <- NA_real_
  }

  sig_df <- gwas2 %>% filter(FDR_sig)

  donor_hits <- NULL
  if (nrow(sig_df) > 0) {
    sig_bins <- sig_df %>%
      mutate(
        Start = floor(Pos / 1e6) * 1e6,
        End = Start + 999999
      ) %>%
      distinct(Chrom, Start, End)

    donor_hits <- bins_geom %>%
      inner_join(sig_bins, by = c("Chrom", "Start", "End"))
  }

  p_donor <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = bins_geom,
      aes(x = Pos_cumMb, y = WE_prop_mean, colour = Subg),
      size = 0.7, alpha = 0.3
    ) +
    {
      if (!is.null(donor_hits) && nrow(donor_hits) > 0)
        geom_point(
          data = donor_hits,
          aes(x = Pos_cumMb, y = WE_prop_mean, fill = Subg),
          shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 1.1, color = "black", alpha = 1
        )
      else NULL
    } +
    scale_colour_manual(values = pal3, guide = "none") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal3, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, xmax_totalMb),
      breaks = axis_df$centerMb,
      labels = gsub("^chr", "", axis_df$Chrom)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, donor_ymax),
      breaks = seq(0, donor_ymax, 0.1),
      name = "Mean donor proportion"
    ) +
    labs(title = title_lab) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )

  ymax_gwas <- max(gwas2$neglog10P[is.finite(gwas2$neglog10P)], na.rm = TRUE)
  ymax_gwas <- max(ymax_gwas * 1.05, ifelse(is.finite(fdr_y), fdr_y * 1.05, 0))

  p_gwas <- ggplot(gwas2, aes(x = Pos_cumMb, y = neglog10P)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Subg), alpha = 0.25, size = 0.8) +
    geom_point(data = sig_df, aes(color = Subg), size = 2.0, alpha = 1) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = pal3, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, xmax_totalMb),
      breaks = axis_df$centerMb,
      labels = gsub("^chr", "", axis_df$Chrom)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, ymax_gwas),
      name = expression(-log[10](p))
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )

  if (is.finite(fdr_y)) {
    p_gwas <- p_gwas +
      geom_hline(yintercept = fdr_y, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30")
  }

  pg <- cowplot::plot_grid(
    p_donor, p_gwas,
    ncol = 1,
    align = "v",
    rel_heights = c(1, 2)
  )

  png(outfile_png, width = png_width, height = png_height, res = png_res, type = "cairo")
  print(pg)
  dev.off()

  message(
    "✔ Wrote: ", outfile_png,
    " | fdr_p=", ifelse(is.finite(fdr_p), signif(fdr_p, 6), NA),
    " | n_FDR=", sum(gwas2$FDR_sig, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  invisible(NULL)
}

# Detect all results files from GAPIT
file_index_list <- lapply(names(model_dirs), function(m) {
  these_files <- list.files(
    model_dirs[[m]],
    pattern = paste0("^GAPIT\\.Association\\.GWAS_Results\\.", m, "\\..+\\.csv$"),
    full.names = TRUE
  )

  if (length(these_files) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  data.frame(
    Model = m,
    File = these_files,
    Trait = vapply(these_files, extract_trait_from_file, character(1), model_name = m),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})

file_index <- do.call(rbind, file_index_list)

if (is.null(file_index) || nrow(file_index) == 0) {
  stop("No GWAS result files found in the model directories.")
}

file_index <- file_index %>%
  arrange(Model, Trait)

cat("Found", nrow(file_index), "GWAS result files.\n")

# Main loop across traits
sig_list <- vector("list", nrow(file_index))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(file_index))) {
  this_model <- file_index$Model[i]
  this_trait <- file_index$Trait[i]
  this_file  <- file_index$File[i]

  cat("Processing", i, "of", nrow(file_index), ":", this_model, this_trait, "\n")

  gwas_raw <- read.csv(this_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  gwas_std <- standardize_gwas(
    gwas = gwas_raw,
    model_name = this_model,
    trait_name = this_trait,
    filepath = this_file
  )

  if (nrow(gwas_std) == 0) {
    sig_list[[i]] <- NULL
    next
  }

  out_png <- file.path(
    out_dir,
    paste0(this_model, "_", this_trait, "_twoTrack_FDR.png")
  )

  plot_two_track(
    gwas_std = gwas_std,
    title_lab = paste0(this_model, ".", this_trait),
    outfile_png = out_png
  )

  sig_hits <- gwas_std %>%
    filter(FDR_sig)

  keep_cols <- c(
    "Model", "Trait", "SNP", "Chrom", "Pos", "P.value", "BH_FDR", "H.B.P.Value",
    "MAF", "nobs", "Effect"
  )
  keep_cols <- keep_cols[keep_cols %in% names(sig_hits)]

  sig_list[[i]] <- sig_hits[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]
}

# Save aggregated table with significant results
sig_table <- do.call(rbind, sig_list)

if (!is.null(sig_table) && nrow(sig_table) > 0) {
  sig_table <- sig_table %>%
    arrange(Model, Trait, P.value)

  write.csv(sig_table, agg_out_file, row.names = FALSE)

  cat("Done.\n")
  cat("Aggregated significant hits written to:\n", agg_out_file, "\n")
  cat("Total significant rows:", nrow(sig_table), "\n")
} else {
  cat("Done, but no FDR-significant SNPs were found.\n")
}

```

```{r}

###############################################################################
## For each significant GWAS SNP, append donor proportions within each 1 Mb bin
###############################################################################

# GWAS_results_BLUPs and _BLUEs are manual aggregates using PVE files from GAPIT outputs
# - REF, ALT, and RP and donor allelic states are added using simple VLOOKUP function in excel using HapMap and parent sequencing information

## BLUPs

# Read results and mean donor proportions files
gwas <- read.csv("C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/GWAS_results_BLUPs.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
bins <- read.csv("C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Pop80_population_mean_bins.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)

# Split the SNP column into Chrom and numeric Position
gwas <- gwas %>%
  mutate(
    Chrom = sub("_(.*)", "", SNP),
    Pos   = as.numeric(sub(".*_", "", SNP))
  )

# Compute the bin start for each SNP (integer division by 1 Mb)
gwas <- gwas %>%
  mutate(
    Start = floor(Pos / 1e6) * 1e6,
    End   = Start + 999999
  )

# Join with the bin table on Chrom + Start + End
gwas_donor <- gwas %>%
  left_join(bins, by=c("Chrom","Start","End"))

write.csv(gwas_donor, "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/GWAS_results_BLUPs_DonorProp.csv", row.names = FALSE)


## BLUEs

gwas <- read.csv("C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/GWAS_results_BLUEs.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
bins <- read.csv("C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Pop80_population_mean_bins.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)

# Split the SNP column into Chrom and numeric Position
gwas <- gwas %>%
  mutate(
    Chrom = sub("_(.*)", "", SNP),
    Pos   = as.numeric(sub(".*_", "", SNP))
  )

# Compute the bin start for each SNP
gwas <- gwas %>%
  mutate(
    Start = floor(Pos / 1e6) * 1e6,
    End   = Start + 999999
  )

# Join with the bin table on Chrom + Start + End
gwas_donor <- gwas %>%
  left_join(bins, by=c("Chrom","Start","End"))

write.csv(gwas_donor, "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/GWAS_results_BLUEs_DonorProp.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}

#####################################################################################
## Determine directions of allelic and donor effects for each significant association
#####################################################################################

## BLUPs

# File paths
gwas_file  <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/GWAS_results_BLUPs_DonorProp.csv"
pheno_file <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/Pheno_GWAS.txt" # input phenotypic file for GWAS
geno_file  <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/Geno_GWAS.txt" # input genotypic file for GWAS

out_file   <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/GWAS_effect_direction_summary.csv"

# Load files
gwas  <- read.csv(gwas_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
pheno <- read.table(pheno_file, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
geno  <- read.table(geno_file,  header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)

str(pheno)

cat("GWAS rows:", nrow(gwas), "\n")
cat("Pheno rows:", nrow(pheno), "\n")
cat("Geno rows:", nrow(geno), "\n")

if (!"Taxa" %in% colnames(pheno)) {
  stop("Pheno file must contain a column named 'Taxa'")
}

if (!"rs" %in% colnames(geno)) {
  stop("Geno file must contain a column named 'rs'")
}

# Helper functions
# Convert genotype strings like "C/C" to "CC"
clean_parent_call <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("/", "", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)
  x[x == "" | is.na(x)] <- NA
  x
}

# Standardize genotype calls so heterozygotes are alphabetical
# e.g. "GA" -> "AG", "C/T" -> "CT"
standardize_genotype <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("/", "", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)
  
  out <- rep(NA_character_, length(x))
  
  for (i in seq_along(x)) {
    xi <- x[i]
    
    if (is.na(xi) || xi %in% c("NN", "N", "", "--")) {
      out[i] <- NA
    } else if (nchar(xi) != 2) {
      out[i] <- NA
    } else {
      alle <- strsplit(xi, "")[[1]]
      out[i] <- paste(sort(alle), collapse = "")
    }
  }
  
  out
}

make_genotype_labels <- function(ref, alt) {
  ref <- gsub("/", "", ref)
  alt <- gsub("/", "", alt)
  
  hom_ref <- paste0(ref, ref)
  hom_alt <- paste0(alt, alt)
  het     <- paste(sort(c(ref, alt)), collapse = "")
  
  list(hom_ref = hom_ref, het = het, hom_alt = hom_alt)
}


## Main loop
results_list <- vector("list", nrow(gwas))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(gwas))) {
  
  hit <- gwas[i, ]
  
  snp_id <- hit$SNP
  trait  <- hit$Trait
  
  cat("Processing", i, "of", nrow(gwas), ":", snp_id, trait, "\n")
  
  # Check trait exists in phenotype file
  if (!trait %in% colnames(pheno)) {
    results_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
      SNP = snp_id,
      Trait = trait,
      Model = hit$Model,
      REF = hit$REF,
      ALT = hit$ALT,
      RP = hit$RP,
      Donor = hit$Donor,
      N = NA,
      Mean_REFREF = NA,
      Mean_HET = NA,
      Mean_ALTALT = NA,
      Allele_low = NA,
      Allele_high = NA,
      RP_direction = NA,
      Donor_direction = NA,
      Note = "Trait not found in phenotype file",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    next
  }
  
  # Find SNP in genotype file
  snp_row <- geno[geno$rs == snp_id, ]
  
  if (nrow(snp_row) == 0) {
    results_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
      SNP = snp_id,
      Trait = trait,
      Model = hit$Model,
      REF = hit$REF,
      ALT = hit$ALT,
      RP = hit$RP,
      Donor = hit$Donor,
      N = NA,
      Mean_REFREF = NA,
      Mean_HET = NA,
      Mean_ALTALT = NA,
      Allele_low = NA,
      Allele_high = NA,
      RP_direction = NA,
      Donor_direction = NA,
      Note = "SNP not found in genotype file",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    next
  }
  
  # If duplicated, keep first and note it
  note_text <- ""
  if (nrow(snp_row) > 1) {
    snp_row <- snp_row[1, , drop = FALSE]
    note_text <- "Duplicate SNP rows in genotype file; first row used"
  }
  
  # Extract genotype calls
  geno_calls <- snp_row[, !(colnames(snp_row) %in% c(
    "rs", "alleles", "chrom", "pos", "strand", "assembly",
    "center", "protLSID", "assayLSID", "panel", "Qccode"
  )), drop = FALSE]
  
  # Convert one SNP row to long format
  geno_df <- data.frame(
    Taxa = colnames(geno_calls),
    Genotype = as.character(geno_calls[1, ]),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  geno_df$Genotype <- standardize_genotype(geno_df$Genotype)
  
  # Pull phenotype
  pheno_df <- data.frame(
    Taxa = pheno$Taxa,
    Pheno = pheno[[trait]],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Merge
  dat <- merge(pheno_df, geno_df, by = "Taxa", all = FALSE)
  dat <- dat[!is.na(dat$Pheno) & !is.na(dat$Genotype), ]
  
  # Build genotype labels from REF/ALT
  ref_allele <- hit$REF
  alt_allele <- hit$ALT
  labs <- make_genotype_labels(ref_allele, alt_allele)
  
  # Means by expected genotype class
  mean_refref <- if (any(dat$Genotype == labs$hom_ref)) {
    mean(dat$Pheno[dat$Genotype == labs$hom_ref], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  mean_het <- if (any(dat$Genotype == labs$het)) {
    mean(dat$Pheno[dat$Genotype == labs$het], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  mean_altalt <- if (any(dat$Genotype == labs$hom_alt)) {
    mean(dat$Pheno[dat$Genotype == labs$hom_alt], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  # Infer lower/higher allele from homozygote means only
  allele_low  <- NA
  allele_high <- NA
  
  if (!is.na(mean_refref) && !is.na(mean_altalt)) {
    if (mean_refref < mean_altalt) {
      allele_low  <- ref_allele
      allele_high <- alt_allele
    } else if (mean_altalt < mean_refref) {
      allele_low  <- alt_allele
      allele_high <- ref_allele
    } else {
      allele_low  <- "Equal"
      allele_high <- "Equal"
    }
  }
  
  # RP / donor direction
  rp_call    <- clean_parent_call(hit$RP)
  donor_call <- clean_parent_call(hit$Donor)
  
  rp_direction <- NA
  donor_direction <- NA
  
  rp_allele <- NA
  donor_allele <- NA
  
  if (!is.na(rp_call) && nchar(rp_call) == 2) {
    rp_allele <- substr(rp_call, 1, 1)
    if (!is.na(allele_high) && rp_allele == allele_high) rp_direction <- "Increase"
    if (!is.na(allele_low)  && rp_allele == allele_low)  rp_direction <- "Decrease"
    if (!is.na(allele_high) && !is.na(allele_low) && allele_high == "Equal" && allele_low == "Equal") {
      rp_direction <- "Equal"
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.na(donor_call) && nchar(donor_call) == 2) {
    donor_allele <- substr(donor_call, 1, 1)
    if (!is.na(allele_high) && donor_allele == allele_high) donor_direction <- "Increase"
    if (!is.na(allele_low)  && donor_allele == allele_low)  donor_direction <- "Decrease"
    if (!is.na(allele_high) && !is.na(allele_low) && allele_high == "Equal" && allele_low == "Equal") {
      donor_direction <- "Equal"
    }
  }
  
  # If RP and donor carry the same allele, donor direction is not interpretable
  if (!is.na(rp_allele) && !is.na(donor_allele) && rp_allele == donor_allele) {
    donor_direction <- NA
  }
  
  # Counts by genotype class
  n_refref <- sum(dat$Genotype == labs$hom_ref, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_het    <- sum(dat$Genotype == labs$het, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_altalt <- sum(dat$Genotype == labs$hom_alt, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Counts matching parental genotype classes exactly
  n_match_RP <- if (!is.na(rp_call)) {
    sum(dat$Genotype == rp_call, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  n_match_Donor <- if (!is.na(donor_call)) {
    sum(dat$Genotype == donor_call, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  results_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
    SNP = snp_id,
    Trait = trait,
    Model = hit$Model,
    Chromosome = hit$Chrom,
    Position = hit$Pos,
    P.value = hit$P.value,
    maf = hit$MAF,
    effect = hit$Effect,
    REF = ref_allele,
    ALT = alt_allele,
    RP = hit$RP,
    Donor = hit$Donor,
    N = nrow(dat),
    N_REFREF = n_refref,
    N_HET = n_het,
    N_ALTALT = n_altalt,
    N_match_RP = n_match_RP,
    N_match_Donor = n_match_Donor,
    Mean_REFREF = mean_refref,
    Mean_HET = mean_het,
    Mean_ALTALT = mean_altalt,
    Allele_low = allele_low,
    Allele_high = allele_high,
    RP_direction = rp_direction,
    Donor_direction = donor_direction,
    Note = note_text,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)


## Save results
write.csv(results, out_file, row.names = FALSE)

cat("Done.\n")
cat("Output written to:\n", out_file, "\n")

# Note: when RP and donor have the same allele, direction of donor effect cannot be unambiguously determined. This code will always try to assign a donor direction, even if the RP is missing an allele call. I manually fixed this by going in and changing to NA any effect directions where RP and donor were ambiguous or where allele calls in parents didn't match REF/ALT from array SNPs used in GWAS.


## BLUEs

# File paths
gwas_file   <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/GWAS_results_BLUEs_DonorProp.csv"
pheno_file1 <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/Pheno_BLUEs_GWAS.txt"
pheno_file2 <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/Pheno_BLUEs_ionomics_GWAS.txt"
geno_file   <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/Geno_GWAS.txt"

out_file    <- "C:/Users/addyhope/OneDrive - Kansas State University/Population Info/GWAS_withinPopIntroMap/Effect_direction/GWAS_effect_direction_summary_BLUEs.csv"

# Load files
gwas   <- read.csv(gwas_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
pheno1 <- read.table(pheno_file1, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
pheno2 <- read.table(pheno_file2, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
geno   <- read.table(geno_file,  header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)

# Merge phenotype files (separate ionomics file)
if (!"Taxa" %in% colnames(pheno1)) stop("Pheno_BLUEs_GWAS.txt must contain 'Taxa'")
if (!"Taxa" %in% colnames(pheno2)) stop("Pheno_BLUEs_ionomics_GWAS.txt must contain 'Taxa'")

# Prevent duplicate trait columns
common_cols <- intersect(colnames(pheno1), colnames(pheno2))
common_cols <- setdiff(common_cols, "Taxa")

if (length(common_cols) > 0) {
  cat("Overlapping non-Taxa columns found:\n")
  print(common_cols)
}

pheno2_only <- pheno2[, setdiff(colnames(pheno2), common_cols), drop = FALSE]
pheno <- merge(pheno1, pheno2_only, by = "Taxa", all = TRUE)

# Force all phenotype columns to numeric
pheno_cols <- setdiff(colnames(pheno), "Taxa")
pheno[pheno_cols] <- lapply(pheno[pheno_cols], function(x) as.numeric(trimws(as.character(x))))

cat("GWAS rows:", nrow(gwas), "\n")
cat("Pheno 1 rows:", nrow(pheno1), "\n")
cat("Pheno 2 rows:", nrow(pheno2), "\n")
cat("Merged pheno rows:", nrow(pheno), "\n")
cat("Geno rows:", nrow(geno), "\n")

if (!"rs" %in% colnames(geno)) {
  stop("Geno file must contain a column named 'rs'")
}

# Helper functions
clean_parent_call <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("/", "", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)
  x[x == "" | is.na(x)] <- NA
  x
}

standardize_genotype <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub("/", "", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)
  
  out <- rep(NA_character_, length(x))
  
  for (i in seq_along(x)) {
    xi <- x[i]
    
    if (is.na(xi) || xi %in% c("NN", "N", "", "--")) {
      out[i] <- NA
    } else if (nchar(xi) != 2) {
      out[i] <- NA
    } else {
      alle <- strsplit(xi, "")[[1]]
      out[i] <- paste(sort(alle), collapse = "")
    }
  }
  
  out
}

make_genotype_labels <- function(ref, alt) {
  ref <- gsub("/", "", ref)
  alt <- gsub("/", "", alt)
  
  hom_ref <- paste0(ref, ref)
  hom_alt <- paste0(alt, alt)
  het     <- paste(sort(c(ref, alt)), collapse = "")
  
  list(hom_ref = hom_ref, het = het, hom_alt = hom_alt)
}

# Main loop
results_list <- vector("list", nrow(gwas))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(gwas))) {
  
  hit <- gwas[i, ]
  
  snp_id <- hit$SNP
  trait  <- hit$Trait
  
  cat("Processing", i, "of", nrow(gwas), ":", snp_id, trait, "\n")
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(pheno)) {
    results_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
      SNP = snp_id,
      Trait = trait,
      Model = hit$Model,
      REF = hit$REF,
      ALT = hit$ALT,
      RP = hit$RP,
      Donor = hit$Donor,
      N = NA,
      N_REFREF = NA,
      N_HET = NA,
      N_ALTALT = NA,
      N_match_RP = NA,
      N_match_Donor = NA,
      Mean_REFREF = NA,
      Mean_HET = NA,
      Mean_ALTALT = NA,
      Allele_low = NA,
      Allele_high = NA,
      RP_direction = NA,
      Donor_direction = NA,
      Note = "Trait not found in merged phenotype file",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    next
  }
  
  snp_row <- geno[geno$rs == snp_id, ]
  
  if (nrow(snp_row) == 0) {
    results_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
      SNP = snp_id,
      Trait = trait,
      Model = hit$Model,
      REF = hit$REF,
      ALT = hit$ALT,
      RP = hit$RP,
      Donor = hit$Donor,
      N = NA,
      N_REFREF = NA,
      N_HET = NA,
      N_ALTALT = NA,
      N_match_RP = NA,
      N_match_Donor = NA,
      Mean_REFREF = NA,
      Mean_HET = NA,
      Mean_ALTALT = NA,
      Allele_low = NA,
      Allele_high = NA,
      RP_direction = NA,
      Donor_direction = NA,
      Note = "SNP not found in genotype file",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    next
  }
  
  note_text <- ""
  if (nrow(snp_row) > 1) {
    snp_row <- snp_row[1, , drop = FALSE]
    note_text <- "Duplicate SNP rows in genotype file; first row used"
  }
  
  geno_calls <- snp_row[, !(colnames(snp_row) %in% c(
    "rs", "alleles", "chrom", "pos", "strand", "assembly",
    "center", "protLSID", "assayLSID", "panel", "Qccode"
  )), drop = FALSE]
  
  geno_df <- data.frame(
    Taxa = colnames(geno_calls),
    Genotype = as.character(geno_calls[1, ]),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  geno_df$Genotype <- standardize_genotype(geno_df$Genotype)
  
  pheno_df <- data.frame(
    Taxa = pheno$Taxa,
    Pheno = pheno[[trait]],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  dat <- merge(pheno_df, geno_df, by = "Taxa", all = FALSE)
  dat$Pheno <- as.numeric(trimws(as.character(dat$Pheno)))
  dat <- dat[!is.na(dat$Pheno) & !is.na(dat$Genotype), ]
  
  ref_allele <- hit$REF
  alt_allele <- hit$ALT
  labs <- make_genotype_labels(ref_allele, alt_allele)
  
  mean_refref <- if (any(dat$Genotype == labs$hom_ref)) {
    mean(dat$Pheno[dat$Genotype == labs$hom_ref], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  mean_het <- if (any(dat$Genotype == labs$het)) {
    mean(dat$Pheno[dat$Genotype == labs$het], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  mean_altalt <- if (any(dat$Genotype == labs$hom_alt)) {
    mean(dat$Pheno[dat$Genotype == labs$hom_alt], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  allele_low  <- NA
  allele_high <- NA
  
  if (!is.na(mean_refref) && !is.na(mean_altalt)) {
    if (mean_refref < mean_altalt) {
      allele_low  <- ref_allele
      allele_high <- alt_allele
    } else if (mean_altalt < mean_refref) {
      allele_low  <- alt_allele
      allele_high <- ref_allele
    } else {
      allele_low  <- "Equal"
      allele_high <- "Equal"
    }
  }
  
  rp_call    <- clean_parent_call(hit$RP)
  donor_call <- clean_parent_call(hit$Donor)
  
  rp_direction <- NA
  donor_direction <- NA
  
  rp_allele <- NA
  donor_allele <- NA
  
  if (!is.na(rp_call) && nchar(rp_call) == 2) {
    rp_allele <- substr(rp_call, 1, 1)
    if (!is.na(allele_high) && rp_allele == allele_high) rp_direction <- "Increase"
    if (!is.na(allele_low)  && rp_allele == allele_low)  rp_direction <- "Decrease"
    if (!is.na(allele_high) && !is.na(allele_low) && allele_high == "Equal" && allele_low == "Equal") {
      rp_direction <- "Equal"
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.na(donor_call) && nchar(donor_call) == 2) {
    donor_allele <- substr(donor_call, 1, 1)
    if (!is.na(allele_high) && donor_allele == allele_high) donor_direction <- "Increase"
    if (!is.na(allele_low)  && donor_allele == allele_low)  donor_direction <- "Decrease"
    if (!is.na(allele_high) && !is.na(allele_low) && allele_high == "Equal" && allele_low == "Equal") {
      donor_direction <- "Equal"
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.na(rp_allele) && !is.na(donor_allele) && rp_allele == donor_allele) {
    donor_direction <- NA
  }
  
  n_refref <- sum(dat$Genotype == labs$hom_ref, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_het    <- sum(dat$Genotype == labs$het, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_altalt <- sum(dat$Genotype == labs$hom_alt, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  n_match_RP <- if (!is.na(rp_call)) {
    sum(dat$Genotype == rp_call, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  n_match_Donor <- if (!is.na(donor_call)) {
    sum(dat$Genotype == donor_call, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  results_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
    SNP = snp_id,
    Trait = trait,
    Model = hit$Model,
    Chromosome = hit$Chrom,
    Position = hit$Pos,
    P.value = hit$P.value,
    maf = hit$MAF,
    effect = hit$Effect,
    REF = ref_allele,
    ALT = alt_allele,
    RP = hit$RP,
    Donor = hit$Donor,
    N = nrow(dat),
    N_REFREF = n_refref,
    N_HET = n_het,
    N_ALTALT = n_altalt,
    N_match_RP = n_match_RP,
    N_match_Donor = n_match_Donor,
    Mean_REFREF = mean_refref,
    Mean_HET = mean_het,
    Mean_ALTALT = mean_altalt,
    Allele_low = allele_low,
    Allele_high = allele_high,
    RP_direction = rp_direction,
    Donor_direction = donor_direction,
    Note = note_text,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

results <- do.call(rbind, results_list)

write.csv(results, out_file, row.names = FALSE)

cat("Done.\n")
cat("Output written to:\n", out_file, "\n")

```
